description_long: This house complex features a modern, modular design with multiple interconnected units arranged around a central paved courtyard. The exterior is predominantly white with flat roofs, large rectangular windows, and minimalistic detailing. The layout includes green lawn areas, several trees, and a spacious driveway leading to multiple garage doors. The structure appears to be composed of two main wings, each with its own set of entrances and outdoor spaces, connected by a central paved area. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open communal spaces.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, white facades, large windows, and a central paved courtyard surrounded by green lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, garage doors, central courtyard, and two main wings with green lawns and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the paved courtyard, back entrances, and additional green spaces with trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, symmetrical window placement, and the connection between the two main wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear lawns, back facades, and the relationship between the building wings and outdoor areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or steps, and direct access from the paved courtyard or driveway.
